Video.summary: Need another Dollhouse for your Dolls? Check out this Fabulous Craft that wont break the bank! We made a Dollar Store Dollhouse PLUS a Doll Bed, Rug and Fuzzy Doll Chair all for under 10 Bucks at the Dollar Store! This craft also makes a great gift!

Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
Video.title: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2

Image.alt: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2
Fabric to Fashion Episode 2
